title: PronounMC
description: Never get someone's pronouns wrong again! Powered by pronoundb.org
body:
This mod allows you to see the pronouns of other users on the player list. It is client only, and uses the [pronoundb.org](https://pronoundb.org/) api to request the pronouns.

It will try 3 times to request the pronouns of each user, waiting at least a second between each request in an attempt to prevent rate-limiting. It also tries to batch api calls together instead of requesting every user individually.
